B

BuildConfig - Class in io.sentry.kafka
 

I

io.sentry.kafka - package io.sentry.kafka
 

S

SENTRY_ENQUEUED_TIME_HEADER - Static variable in class io.sentry.kafka.SentryKafkaProducer
 
SENTRY_KAFKA_SDK_NAME - Static variable in class io.sentry.kafka.BuildConfig
 
SentryKafkaConsumerTracing - Class in io.sentry.kafka
Helper methods for instrumenting raw Kafka consumer record processing.
SentryKafkaProducer - Class in io.sentry.kafka
Wraps a Kafka Producer to record a queue.publish span around each send and to inject Sentry trace propagation headers into the produced record.

T

TRACE_ORIGIN - Static variable in class io.sentry.kafka.SentryKafkaConsumerTracing
 
TRACE_ORIGIN - Static variable in class io.sentry.kafka.SentryKafkaProducer
 

V

VERSION_NAME - Static variable in class io.sentry.kafka.BuildConfig
 

W

withTracing(ConsumerRecord<K, V>, Runnable) - Static method in class io.sentry.kafka.SentryKafkaConsumerTracing
Runs the provided Runnable with a Kafka consumer processing transaction for the given record.
withTracing(ConsumerRecord<K, V>, Callable<U>) - Static method in class io.sentry.kafka.SentryKafkaConsumerTracing
Runs the provided Callable with a Kafka consumer processing transaction for the given record.
wrap(Producer<K, V>) - Static method in class io.sentry.kafka.SentryKafkaProducer
Wraps the given producer with Sentry instrumentation.
wrap(Producer<K, V>, IScopes) - Static method in class io.sentry.kafka.SentryKafkaProducer
Wraps the given producer with Sentry instrumentation using the provided scopes.
wrap(Producer<K, V>, IScopes, String) - Static method in class io.sentry.kafka.SentryKafkaProducer
Wraps the given producer with Sentry instrumentation.
